prestazioni: Ford Duratec 2.0L (engine code: *Duratec-HE*) stroker kit to 2.3L using a *Manley 87.5mm forged crankshaft*, *Manley H-beam connecting rods*, and *JE 9:1 forged pistons* for 250+ hp at 8,500 RPM with a *Toda Racing Stage 3A camshaft* (280° duration, 12.5mm lift) and *Supertech titanium retainers* for valvetrain stability

Custom *TurboSmart Comp-Gate40* wastegate paired with a *Garrett GT2860RS-5 turbocharger* (0.64 A/R turbine housing) running 18 psi on a *Ginetta-specific cast manifold* (fabricated by *Bell Auto Services*), with a *PWR 450kW intercooler* and *Silicone Intakes 4-ply silicone charge pipes*

Full *Syvecs S6Plus* standalone ECU with *Motec PDM15* power distribution module, *AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensor*, and *Plex Tuning Knock Monitor* for real-time ignition timing adjustments, paired with a *Nuke Performance fuel surge tank* and dual *Bosch Motorsport 044 fuel pumps* feeding *ID1000x injectors*
estetica: Full *Ginetta G40R-spec carbon fiber body kit* (front splitter, side skirts, rear diffuser, and *Rear Wing Solutions GT3-style rear wing* with *3D-printed adjustable mounts* for 150+ kg downforce at 120 mph)

*OMP Carbon Kevlar racing seats* with *Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses* and *Ginetta-specific roll cage* (T45 steel, *Custom Cages UK* design) with *MCS Motorsport fire suppression system* (plumbed to *Lifeline Zero 360* extinguishers)

*Enkei PF07 17x9 +35 ET wheels* in *Gunmetal* with *Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires* (245/40/17 front, 275/35/17 rear), paired with *AP Racing CP6640-2600 6-pot front calipers* and *CP5350-1800 4-pot rear calipers* on *Ginetta-specific two-piece rotors* (356mm front, 330mm rear)
